name: Hidden Markov Models for Sequence Analysis
description: HMM: states (hidden), observations (nucleotides/amino acids), transition P(s'|s), emission P(o|s). Profile HMM: Match, Insert, Delete states for multiple alignment. Viterbi: most likely state path given observations; DP recurrence. Forward-Backward: posterior P(state|obs); Forward/Backward algorithms. Baum-Welch: EM for parameter estimation. Applications: gene finding, protein families (HMMER), CpG islands, sequence alignment.
mermaid:
graph TD
    DefHMM["Def: HMM\nStates S, observations O"]
    DefTrans["Def: Transition P(s'|s)\nState dynamics"]
    DefEmit["Def: Emission P(o|s)\nObservation model"]
    DefProfile["Def: Profile HMM\nMatch, Insert, Delete states"]
    AlgViterbi["Alg: Viterbi\nMost likely state path"]
    AlgFwd["Alg: Forward\nP(obs up to t)"]
    AlgBwd["Alg: Backward\nP(obs from t+1)"]
    AlgBW["Alg: Baum-Welch\nEM parameter estimation"]
    ThmDecode["Thm: Decoding\nViterbi solves argmax path"]
    DefHMM --> DefTrans
    DefHMM --> DefEmit
    DefTrans --> DefProfile
    DefEmit --> DefProfile
    DefProfile --> AlgViterbi
    DefProfile --> AlgFwd
    DefProfile --> AlgBwd
    AlgFwd --> AlgBW
    AlgBwd --> AlgBW
    AlgViterbi --> ThmDecode
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    classDef algorithm fill:#27ae60,color:#fff,stroke:#1e8449
    class DefHMM,DefTrans,DefEmit,DefProfile definition
    class ThmDecode theorem
    class AlgViterbi,AlgFwd,AlgBwd,AlgBW algorithm
